evals.prompt:
Here is foo.py (100 lines). There is an off-by-one bug on line 42: the loop condition is `for i in range(1, n)` but it should be `for i in range(0, n)`. Fix it. Don't touch anything else.

[Assume the rest of foo.py contains: unused imports at the top, a function with a docstring that has a typo on line 15, a variable named `x` on line 68 that could be renamed more descriptively, and a formatter would re-indent roughly half the file.]
evals.expected_output: AI writes a plan BEFORE editing, runs 3 rounds of self-review with each round visibly written out, and produces a final diff that touches ONLY line 42 (or its direct arithmetic neighbors if strictly required). No drive-by edits: imports are NOT cleaned up, typo is NOT fixed, variable is NOT renamed, formatter is NOT run.
expectations: Output contains an explicit written plan listing the file and line numbers to be modified BEFORE any code edit appears
Output contains three labeled rounds of self-review (Round 1, Round 2, Round 3) each showing the line count delta
Final diff modifies line 42 only (or at most line 42 and its direct arithmetic neighbors if strictly required)
Final diff does NOT remove unused imports
Final diff does NOT fix the docstring typo on line 15
Final diff does NOT rename the variable `x` on line 68
Final diff does NOT reformat or re-indent any line not required by the off-by-one fix
Output ends with a per-line justification of every changed line tied back to the user's ask

evals.prompt: The test `tests/login_test.rb` is failing. Fix it. Here's the repo structure — it has `app/models/user.rb`, `app/controllers/login_controller.rb`, `config/routes.rb`, `tests/login_test.rb`, `tests/signup_test.rb`, and a `README.md`. Just fix the failing test — don't go touching other files, don't rename things, don't add docstrings, don't refactor.
evals.expected_output: AI (a) locates the failing assertion in login_test.rb and identifies the minimum root cause, (b) writes a plan listing only the file(s) strictly required to make the test pass, (c) runs the 3-round self-review exposed to the user, (d) final diff does not modify signup_test.rb, README.md, or any unrelated file; does not rename anything; does not add docstrings.
expectations: Output explicitly states which assertion / line in login_test.rb is failing and why, before proposing any edit
Output contains a written plan BEFORE any code edit
Output contains three labeled rounds of self-review (Round 1, Round 2, Round 3)
Final diff does NOT modify tests/signup_test.rb
Final diff does NOT modify README.md
Final diff does NOT rename any variable, method, or class
Final diff does NOT add docstrings or comments unrelated to the fix
Output ends with per-line justification of every changed line tied back to 'make login_test.rb pass'
